description_long: This object depicts a uniformed police officer standing upright with arms extended horizontally. The officer is dressed in a dark blue patrol uniform, featuring a long-sleeve shirt with visible gold buttons, a badge on the chest, and shoulder patches. A utility belt is equipped with various tools, including pouches and holsters, and the officer wears black shoes. The head is adorned with a dark blue peaked cap featuring a badge and a white band, and the officer also wears dark sunglasses. The uniform is detailed with gold insignia and a nameplate, and the overall appearance is clean and professional, suitable for urban law enforcement duties.
description: A uniformed police officer in a dark blue patrol outfit with a utility belt, peaked cap, and sunglasses, detailed with gold insignia and patches.
description_view_0: Front view showing the officer's face, sunglasses, chest badge, nameplate, and full utility belt.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the cap, shoulder patch, and side equipment on the utility belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the uniform, belt equipment, and the back of the cap with hair visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, shoulder patch, and utility belt details.
attribute_uniform_type: Standard police patrol uniform with long-sleeve navy blue shirt, matching pants, gold buttons, shoulder patches, utility belt, and black shoes.
attribute_headgear_style: Navy blue peaked cap with a gold badge and white band
